sagemaker.appimageconfig.AppImageConfigN.Docs: The name of the AppImageConfig. Must be unique to your account.

sagemaker.appimageconfig.KernelGatewayIm.Docs: The configuration for the file system and kernels in the SageMaker image.

sagemaker.appimageconfig.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
